summary: Iteration 121 - Code Audit Fixes Testing Complete. All 21 backend tests passed. Verified fixes for: OpenClaw now_iso import, Tier23 custom agent test real AI execution, Research report AI generation, Media feature flags (video/music/sfx), Platform capabilities features block, MFA invalid timestamp handling, A2A/operator JSON parse handling, and no syntax/runtime regression in touched files.
critical_code_review_comments: VideoPanel.js correctly implements feature flag gating - shows disabled notice and disables Generate button when video_generation.enabled is false
FEATURE_FLAGS in nexus_config.py properly defines video_generation, music_generation, and sfx_generation with enabled=false and descriptive reasons
Platform capabilities endpoint correctly returns features block from FEATURE_FLAGS

success_rate.frontend: N/A - VideoPanel.js code review verified correct implementation

seed_data_creation: Test agents and research sessions created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All code audit fixes from Nexus_Full_Code_Audit.docx have been verified. Key endpoints tested: /api/openclaw/health (200 OK, no NameError), /api/agents/custom/{id}/test (returns real AI response or clean 400), /api/research/{session_id}/report (no static placeholder text), /api/workspaces/{id}/generate-video|image-to-video|generate-music|generate-sfx (all return 501 with feature flag reasons), /api/platform/capabilities (includes features block), /api/auth/mfa/verify (returns 400 for invalid/expired challenges), A2A and operator endpoints handle empty bodies gracefully.
